claim: Using /run command in AIDER to pipe test output back enables self-correction of failing tests
actionable: Use AIDER's /run command with pytest to automatically identify and fix test failures

claim: AI can generate initial test scaffolding that covers 60-70% of testing value in minutes
actionable: Use AIDER to generate initial test scaffolding, then refine with manual testing for edge cases

claim: Test parameterization allows running multiple test variations with different inputs efficiently
actionable: Request test parameterization from AIDER when generating tests to cover multiple input scenarios
